title: The Crocodile Who Couldn’t Stop Honking
premise_summary: crocodile’s shoelace honks when he moves
cover_description: A crocodile with one shoelace dangling from his nose, mid-honk, while a mouse calmly ties it into a bow
script:
[TITLE: The Crocodile Who Couldn’t Stop Honking]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: sound_effect_comedy]

[SETUP]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious, tentative] What’s that strange noise coming from the swamp? [STING: tiptoe]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, dismissive] Oh, that? That’s just my *ahem* majestic swamp trumpet. [STING: villain_dramatic]

[BEAT_1]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] It sounds like a goose with a kazoo. [STING: medium_hit]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: bluster, defensive] Nonsense! It’s a regal fanfare for my glorious presence. [STING: villain_entrance]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: pressing] Then why did it just honk when you sneezed? [STING: boing]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: caught off guard, scrambling] That—that was a *cough* royal sneeze salute! [STING: slide_whistle]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha] So… every time you move, it honks? [STING: tiny]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] Silence, rodent! It’s a *curse*! A *hex*! [STING: big_crash]

[BEAT_3]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] It’s your shoelace stuck in your nostril. [STING: silence]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: stunned, deflated] …Oh. [STING: deflation]

[BUTTON]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]I meant to do that! It’s my new signature scent—*Eau de Gym Sock*! [/PUNCHLINE] [STING: splat]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: deadpan] You’re welcome. [STING: sweet_eyeroll]

[COVER: A crocodile with one shoelace dangling from his nose, mid-honk, while a mouse calmly ties it into a bow]
[PREMISE: crocodile’s shoelace honks when he moves]
